chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail. Appl. No.2430 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 10.12.2024 Mr. Haresh Kumar, advocate for applicant. Mr. Saleem Akhtar Buriro, Addl. P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant Khawar s/o Abdul Rehman is seeking post arrest bail in Crime No.627/2024 U/s 353, 324, 186, 34 PPC of P.S. Quaidabad, Karachi. 2. As per FIR, allegedly when police party of P.S. Qauaidabad was on patrol duty, they spotted three persons riding on a motorcycle in suspicious condition on 04.10.2024 at Eidgah ground, Sector 1, Majeed Colony, Landhi, Malir Karachi. Police party called them out but they started firing upon police, police retaliated the same and injured on person out of them. Consequently, all three persons including the applicant were arrested. Applicant was found driving the motorcycle whereas other two accused namely Babar and Zeeshan were found armed with pistol. 3. Learned defence counsel submits that both the co-accused have been granted bail by the trial court and bail of the applicant was dismissed because of the fact that previously he was involved in a criminal case u/s 381-A PPC but in that case he has been acquitted. 4. Learned Addl. P.G. has opposed the bail. However, on the basis of rule of consistency when two co-accused have been granted bail, applicant is also entitled to the same relief. 5. Accordingly, this application is allowed and applicant is granted bail subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trial court. The bail application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
